stages.log_text: Loremaster Aelarion entrusted you with a Beast Codex and your first companion.
Bond your first wild beast in the Willowmere outskirts.
Return to the Loremaster with three bonded beasts.
Earn each Conclave Mark across Eldarwyn.
All nine Marks collected. Champion-Seer Orielle awaits at Highcrest.
Defeat each Conclave Warden across Eldarwyn.
All Marks of Eldarwyn are yours.
Word of the Crimson Talon has reached you. Investigate their movements in Eldarwyn.
Foil three Crimson Talon grunts.
Find the hideout of Ravenmaw Vex.
You defeated Ravenmaw Vex - the Crimson Talon is broken.
Bind 30 distinct beasts native to Eldarwyn.
Bind 60 distinct beasts native to Eldarwyn.
Defeat the first of four councilors.
Defeat the second of four councilors.
Defeat the third of four councilors.
All four councilors fallen. Now the Highlord stands ready.
You unseated the Highlord of Eldarwyn. The realm's balloons are yours.
All cities of Eldarwyn now host a sky-balloon. The realm is open to you.
The Hubspire balloon for Eldarwyn is anchored. Return at any time.

Drop a compatible pair at Matron Sylpha's Hatchery.
Receive your first hatchling.
Choose a Bond Companion with Keeper Thalor.
Walk far enough that your bond ascends.
Send a beast into the Ethereal Glade.
Catch six rare visitors during a single Glade tour.
Defeat the Highlord of every realm and stand at the Hubspire's center.
Bind 250 distinct beasts.
Bind 500 distinct beasts.
Bind 800 distinct beasts.
Every beast in the codex is bound.
Every Highlord has fallen. Champion-Seer Orielle senses the realm needs renewal.
Speak with Champion-Seer Orielle at the Hubspire to begin the Gym Reset rite.
Tour each Conclave - the Wardens have rebuilt their bonds and stand ready for rematches.
Defeat every Conclave Warden a second time, in any order, to confirm the renewal.
All Conclaves are reset. New wardens may now claim Marks. The Champion may rest.
Bind 25 Divine variants.
Bind 100 Divine variants.
